title: mcpcheck configuration
description: Configuration for the mcpcheck linter. See https://github.com/MukundaKatta/mcpcheck

rules.description: Per-rule enablement and severity. Omitted rules keep their defaults.

missingTransport.description: Server has no transport ‚Äî A server entry has neither `command` (stdio) nor `url` (http/sse).

conflictingTransport.description: Transport fields contradict each other ‚Äî Both `command` and `url` are set, or `transport` disagrees with them.

invalidCommand.description: `command` is missing or not a string ‚Äî `command` must be a non-empty string.

invalidArgs.description: `args` is not an array of strings ‚Äî `args` has to be an array of strings.

invalidEnv.description: `env` is not a string-valued object ‚Äî `env` must be an object, and each value must be a string.

hardcodedSecret.description: Hardcoded API key ‚Äî A value in `env` matches a known secret format (OpenAI, Anthropic, GitHub, AWS, Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid, HuggingFace, npm, GitLab, Slack, Azure, Google).

invalidUrl.description: URL is malformed, non-http(s), or insecure ‚Äî `url` does not parse, isn't http/https, or is plain http to a non-local host.

invalidTransport.description: `transport` value is not one of the accepted tokens ‚Äî `transport` must be one of `stdio`, `sse`, `streamable-http`.

unknownField.description: Unknown field on a server ‚Äî A field on the server object isn't in the MCP schema.

relativePath.description: `command` starts with `./` or `../` ‚Äî The command is a relative path.

emptyServers.description: Config has no server entries ‚Äî No `mcpServers` / `servers` / `context_servers` key, or it is empty.

duplicateServerName.description: Case-insensitive duplicate server name ‚Äî Two server entries differ only by case.

unstableReference.description: Unpinned package or image reference ‚Äî `npx <pkg>` / `uvx <pkg>` / `docker run <image>` without a pinned version.

dangerousCommand.description: Privilege escalation, remote-shell pipe, or host-root mount ‚Äî Config instructs the client to execute `curl | sh`, `sudo`, `docker --privileged`, `-v /:/`, or similar.

httpWithoutAuth.description: HTTPS server without an Authorization header ‚Äî A URL-transport server targets an https endpoint but declares no `Authorization` header.

duplicateEnvKey.description: Case-colliding env var names on a server ‚Äî Two entries in `env` differ only by case (e.g. `API_KEY` and `ApiKey`).

shellMetachars.description: Shell metacharacters without a shell ‚Äî `command` contains `|`, `;`, `$(‚Ä¶)`, backticks, `&&`, `||`, `&`, or `$VAR` but isn't a shell.

typosquatPackage.description: Package name looks like a typo of an official MCP server ‚Äî An `npx` / `uvx` package name is within edit distance 3 of an official `@modelcontextprotocol/*` server but doesn't match it.

emptyArgs.description: Package / container runner with empty args ‚Äî A command that needs arguments (`npx` / `uvx` / `docker` / shells) has `args: []`.

placeholderValue.description: Env value is a copy-paste placeholder ‚Äî An `env` value looks like template text (`YOUR_API_KEY_HERE`, `<token>`, `xxx‚Ä¶`, `replace-me`, `TODO`).

plaintextHttpWithToken.description: Credential header sent over plain HTTP ‚Äî The URL starts with `http://` (non-local) AND the server declares `Authorization` / `X-API-Key` / `Cookie` / similar.

invalidEnvVarName.description: Env var name isn't POSIX-portable ‚Äî An env var name doesn't match `[A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]*`.

emptyEnvValue.description: Env var with an empty-string value ‚Äî An `env` entry has value `""`.

cwdNotAbsolute.description: Server `cwd` is a relative path ‚Äî Server declares `cwd: "./foo"` / `cwd: "foo"`.

include.description: Extra glob patterns to treat as MCP configs.

plugins.description: npm package names implementing the `Plugin` interface exported from `mcpcheck`.

enabled.description: Turn the rule on or off entirely.

severity.description: Severity to report at. `off` is equivalent to `enabled: false` but allows toggling without losing the severity.
